full_text:
Zhao Rong (Zhichang) 趙融 (稚長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Rong (趙融), styledZhichang (稚長), was born in Hanyang. On hearing of Yuan Shao’s poor treatment of Zheng Xuan, predicted Yuan Shao would fall. Zhao Rong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
